title: Il grande colpo dei 7 uomini d'oro
actors: Philippe Leroy, Rossana Podestà, Gastone Moschin
plot: The Professor (Leroy) and his men are captured by U.S. agents during an attempted train robbery. To avoid jail, they must kidnap a Latin dictator. The film is filled with cool sci-fi gadgets, including flying jetpacks. Austin Powe...
